Sierra

A dedicated teammate with enhanced abilities, Sierra has climbed the ranks of Helix Security. With her positive attitude, there's no challenge she can't face.

Damage

Recon

Grand Mesa, Colorado

Apr 17 (Age: 25)

Abilities

Helix RifleTracking ShotTremor ChargeAnchor DroneTrailblazer

Helix Rifle

Automatic assault weapon. Shoots in a spiral pattern, gaining accuracy with sustained fire.

Tracking Shot

Marks an enemy. Helix Rifle shots automatically track marked enemies.

Tremor Charge

Throw a charge that creates a shockwave on impact.

Anchor Drone

Launch an Anchor Drone. Reactivate to grapple to it.

Trailblazer

Deploy a drone that flies forward and drops explosives. 

Keys displayed are defaults for PC. They are configurable in game.

Perks

Unlock mid-match upgrades to outsmart, outplay, and dominate the fight. As the action heats up, choose game-changing abilities to amplify your Hero’s power and evolve your strategy in real time.

Minor Perk

(Level 2)

Full Flight

Increase Anchor Drone flight and grapple ranges by 25%.

Tight Grip

Helix Rifle's bullet spread tightens 100% faster and widens 30% slower.

Major Perk

(Level 3)

Medi-Drone

Anchor Drones hold a medkit that can heal Sierra.

Locked In

Firing Tracking Shot increases your attack speed by 20% for 2 seconds.

Keys displayed are defaults for PC. They are configurable in game.

Story

Growing up with unique talents and more new addresses than friends, Sierra Turner Woods could always count on her mother Kendra for support. When her mother disappeared, Sierra’s hunt for the truth led her to work for Helix Security International. As head of security at Watchpoint: Grand Mesa, she uncovered records revealing her mother’s mysterious past as Soldier: 00. Sierra hopes that working with Overwatch will give her the answers she needs to continue her search.

LIFE ON THE RUN

Sierra grew up everywhere. Her mother, Kendra Woods, never said much about her past or explained why they were always on the move, but she taught Sierra how to spot trouble. As she bounced from school to school, Sierra consistently placed at the top of her class, but her preternatural skill and itinerant lifestyle put her at odds with her peers. Through it all, Sierra’s mother encouraged Sierra to take pride in her exceptional talent and celebrate every win, instilling in her a sense of self-confidence that she would carry with her into adulthood.

Just before her thirteenth Birthday, Sierra’s mother mysteriously disappeared. Alone for the first time, Sierra followed her mother’s emergency protocol and used the bus ticket left in her mother’s things. The trail led her to the father she’d never met: James Turner, a park ranger in Virginia. As they grew closer, James explained how he met Kendra when she was living off the grid; how they settled down and started a family together, thinking they were safe in the seclusion of the Appalachian mountains; and how only a year later, Sierra’s mother fled in the night, taking their daughter with her. The only clue he had to Kendra’s past was that after she disappeared with Sierra, the US Government raided the house they'd built together, asking questions about “Project Naughton.”

SUMMIT SQUAD

Sierra was determined to track her mother down. With her father’s support, Sierra doggedly pursued the only lead she had. But “Project Naughton” was highly classified—whatever was left of the program had been transferred to Helix Security International, reportedly sealed away in a vault at Watchpoint: Grand Mesa. Leveraging her unique physical prowess and exceptional intelligence, Sierra applied to work for Helix and quickly found her place as a squad leader in Helix’s Perilous Operations team—colloquially known as the Summit Squad—which specialized in missions in difficult terrain.

Utilizing plasma weaponry and her trusty R.O.T.H (remote operated traversal helper) unit DoR.O.T.H.y, Sierra spearheaded rescue missions in narrow canyons, busted criminal operations in cave networks, and lead her team to success atop the world’s highest peaks. From dangers in the Grand Canyon to Niagara, there was no challenge too great for Sierra to take on.  In just a few years, she earned a promotion to Watchpoint: Grand Mesa, just as she had planned. Finally, she was a step closer to the truth.

PROJECT NAUGHTON

As the Head of Security at Grand Mesa, the youngest in Helix’s history, Sierra finally had access to classified documents. She learned that her mother, whose real name was Kendra Banks, had another moniker: Soldier: 00. As the first candidate of the Soldier Enhancement program, Sierra’s mother had been subject to a series of experiments that had altered her body and given her uncanny abilities. Kendra’s service after that point was poorly documented or redacted, suggesting that she’d defected from the program shortly after her procedure and been in hiding ever since. Finally, Sierra’s own miraculous strength and skill made sense... but her mother’s whereabouts remained a mystery. 

REIGN OF TALON

When Watchpoint: Grand Mesa was attacked by Talon, Sierra and her squad joined forces with Overwatch to fight them off. Sierra quickly took command, directing her squad to assist against the Deadlock Gang and Talon’s forces. Knowing Overwatch’s history of working with Jack Morrison and Gabriel Reyes, two of the Soldier Enhancement Program’s greatest successes, Sierra hopes that working with Overwatch will give her the information she needs to continue her search.
